Cross-Camera Body Re-ID Fusion (Session Linking)
nodes.rationale: OSNet body embeddings (>0.85 similarity) bridge frontal-vs-profile face failures across cameras within an overlapping time window; merge face galleries on match.

nodes.label: Tracklet-Based Identity Resolution
nodes.rationale: Track persons across a few seconds via ByteTrack/DeepSORT, collect multiple face angles, then send the best face to the DB to avoid premature NEW VISITOR registration on first blurry frame.

nodes.label: Dynamic Pose-Adaptive Thresholds
nodes.rationale: Lower RETURNING_FACE_THRESHOLD (0.55 to 0.48) when pose_bin mismatch is observed, gated by high body embedding similarity.

nodes.label: Global (Topology-Aware) Temporal Gate
nodes.rationale: Replace naive 150px spatial check with cross-camera logical gate; a visitor disappearing from Camera 1 and appearing in Camera 2 seconds later with matching body embedding is assumed to be the same person.

nodes.label: Offline / Nightly Global Deduplication
nodes.rationale: Run DBSCAN nightly over that day's visitors using weighted Face (0.6) + Body (0.4) + Time Overlap scores to propose high-confidence merges.

nodes.label: Cross-Stream Batching
nodes.rationale: Introduce a global batching queue so YOLO/OSNet batch crops from multiple cameras into a single tensor (batch size 16) for GPU utilization.

nodes.label: Upgrade Feature Extractors (Future-Proofing)
nodes.rationale: Evaluate upgrading OSNet to StrongSORT/BoT-SORT for occlusion robustness and switching ArcFace to AdaFace for pose-invariant face recognition.

nodes.label: HNSW ef_search Tuning
nodes.rationale: Set hnsw.ef_search=100 (via SET LOCAL) per resolve transaction to prevent filtered queries from exhausting graph candidates and re-registering returning visitors as new.

nodes.label: Per-person ArcFace Fallback Gating
nodes.rationale: Gate the second per-person ArcFace pass behind PER_PERSON_FACE_FALLBACK so deployments with strong full-frame face detection can avoid N extra ArcFace forward passes per crowded frame.

nodes.label: Empty-Frame Early-Out
nodes.rationale: Skip per-person and body-queue loops when YOLO finds no persons AND ArcFace finds no faces.

nodes.label: Tracklet Fast-Path
nodes.rationale: Pin visitor_id and verified_embedding on a confident tracklet match; attribute later frames directly without gallery search. Drift guard re-verifies on time, IoU, or face drift.

nodes.label: Consolidate Per-Match DB Round-Trips
nodes.rationale: Fetch visitor gallery (embedding, det_score, pose_bin, body_embedding) once per match instead of three sequential SELECTs in auto_enroller.update_after_match.

nodes.label: Masked-Face Periocular Batching
nodes.rationale: Batch periocular ArcFace embeds across masked faces in the frame and short-circuit mask detection when MASK_DETECTION_ENABLED is off.

nodes.label: Persist ef_search at Index/Role Level
nodes.rationale: Belt-and-suspenders ALTER DATABASE ... SET hnsw.ef_search=100 so future queries missing SET LOCAL still benefit.

nodes.label: Fused-Score Re-Ranking of Candidates
nodes.rationale: Compute w_f*face_sim + w_b*body_sim fused score for same-session grey-zone candidates before the ambiguity gate (not across visits).

nodes.label: Detector Input-Size Auto-Selection
nodes.rationale: Auto-pick INSIGHTFACE_DET_SIZE (640/480/320) based on median detected face size over a warmup window for speed/recall trade.

nodes.label: Model Upgrades (Evaluate, Don't Rush)
nodes.rationale: Evaluate AdaFace (pose/low-quality) and BoT-SORT/StrongSORT (occlusion robustness) as drop-in replacements behind config, A/B on detection_events.
